measure.name: res_stock_arguments_post_hpxml
measure.description: Measure that post-processes the output of the BuildResidentialHPXML and BuildResidentialScheduleFile measures.
measure.modeler_description: Passes in all ResStockArgumentsPostHPXML arguments from the options lookup, processes them, and then modifies output of other measures.

argument.name: hpxml_path
argument.description: Absolute/relative path of the HPXML file.

argument.name: whole_sfa_or_mf_building_sim
argument.description: If the HPXML file represents a single family-attached/multifamily building with multiple dwelling units defined, specifies whether to run the HPXML file as a single whole building model.

argument.name: simulation_control_run_period_calendar_year
argument.display_name: Simulation Control: Run Period Calendar Year
argument.description: This numeric field should contain the calendar year that determines the start day of week. If you are running simulations using AMY weather files, the value entered for calendar year will not be used; it will be overridden by the actual year found in the AMY weather file.

argument.name: hvac_flex_peak_offset
argument.display_name: HVAC Load Flexibility: Peak Offset (deg F)
argument.description: Offset of the peak period in degrees Fahrenheit.

argument.name: hvac_flex_pre_peak_duration_hours
argument.description: Duration of the pre-peak period in hours.

argument.name: hvac_flex_pre_peak_offset
argument.display_name: HVAC Load Flexibility: Pre-Peak Offset (deg F)
argument.description: Offset of the pre-peak period in degrees Fahrenheit.

argument.name: flex_random_shift_minutes
argument.description: Number of minutes to randomly shift the peak period. If minutes is less than timestep, it will be assumed to be 0.

argument.name: ev_flex_enabled
argument.description: Whether to enable EV flexibility.

argument.name: air_leakage_percent_reduction
argument.description: Reduction (%) on the air exchange rate value.

argument.name: refrigerator_usage_multiplier
argument.description: Multiplier on the refrigerator energy usage that can reflect, e.g., high/low usage occupants.

argument.name: clothes_dryer_usage_multiplier
argument.description: Multiplier on the clothes dryer energy usage that can reflect, e.g., high/low usage occupants.

argument.name: clothes_washer_usage_multiplier
argument.description: Multiplier on the clothes washer energy usage that can reflect, e.g., high/low usage occupants.

argument.name: cooking_range_oven_usage_multiplier
argument.description: Multiplier on the cooking range/oven energy usage that can reflect, e.g., high/low usage occupants.

argument.name: dishwasher_usage_multiplier
argument.description: Multiplier on the dishwasher energy usage that can reflect, e.g., high/low usage occupants.

argument.name: extra_refrigerator_usage_multiplier
argument.description: Multiplier on the extra refrigerator energy usage that can reflect, e.g., high/low usage occupants.

argument.name: freezer_usage_multiplier
argument.description: Multiplier on the freezer energy usage that can reflect, e.g., high/low usage occupants.

argument.name: misc_plug_loads_television_usage_multiplier
argument.description: Multiplier on the television energy usage that can reflect, e.g., high/low usage occupants.

argument.name: misc_plug_loads_other_usage_multiplier
argument.description: Multiplier on the other energy usage that can reflect, e.g., high/low usage occupants.

argument.name: bathroom_fans_start_hour
argument.description: The hour of the day when the bathroom fans run.

argument.name: kitchen_fans_start_hour
argument.description: The hour of the day when the kitchen fans run.

argument.name: schedules_vacancy_periods
argument.description: Specifies the vacancy periods. Enter a date like "Dec 15 - Jan 15". Optionally, can enter hour of the day like "Dec 15 2 - Jan 15 20" (start hour can be 0 through 23 and end hour can be 1 through 24). If multiple periods, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: building_id
argument.description: The building unit number (between 1 and the number of samples).

argument.name: ev_miles_driven_per_year
argument.display_name: Electric Vehicle: Miles Driven Per Year
argument.description: The annual miles the electric vehicle is driven.

argument.name: ev_fraction_charged_home
argument.display_name: Electric Vehicle: Fraction Charged at Home
argument.description: The fraction of charging energy provided by the at-home charger to the electric vehicle.

argument.name: ev_efficiency_percent_increase
argument.description: The increase (fraction) in efficiency of the electric vehicle.

argument.name: electric_panel_breaker_spaces_headroom
argument.description: The unoccupied number of breaker spaces on the electric panel.

argument.name: electric_panel_breaker_spaces_rated_total
argument.display_name: Electric Panel: Breaker Spaces Rated Total
argument.description: The rated total number of breaker spaces on the electric panel.

argument.name: electric_panel_load_heating_system_new_load
argument.display_name: Electric Panel: Heating System New Load
argument.description: Whether the heating system is a new panel load addition to an existing service panel.

argument.name: electric_panel_load_cooling_system_new_load
argument.display_name: Electric Panel: Cooling System New Load
argument.description: Whether the cooling system is a new panel load addition to an existing service panel.

argument.name: electric_panel_load_heat_pump_new_load
argument.display_name: Electric Panel: Heat Pump New Load
argument.description: Whether the heat pump is a new panel load addition to an existing service panel.

argument.name: electric_panel_load_heating_system_2_new_load
argument.display_name: Electric Panel: Heating System 2 New Load
argument.description: Whether the second heating system is a new panel load addition to an existing service panel.

argument.name: electric_panel_load_mech_vent_fan_new_load
argument.display_name: Electric Panel: Mechanical Ventilation New Load
argument.description: Whether the mechanical ventilation is a new panel load addition to an existing service panel.

argument.name: electric_panel_load_whole_house_fan_new_load
argument.display_name: Electric Panel: Whole House Fan New Load
argument.description: Whether the whole house fan is a new panel load addition to an existing service panel.

argument.name: electric_panel_load_kitchen_fans_new_load
argument.display_name: Electric Panel: Kitchen Fans New Load
argument.description: Whether the kitchen fans is a new panel load addition to an existing service panel.

argument.name: electric_panel_load_bathroom_fans_new_load
argument.display_name: Electric Panel: Bathroom Fans New Load
argument.description: Whether the bathroom fans is a new panel load addition to an existing service panel.

argument.name: electric_panel_load_electric_water_heater_new_load
argument.display_name: Electric Panel: Electric Water Heater New Load
argument.description: Whether the water heater is a new panel load addition to an existing service panel. Only applies to electric water heater.

argument.name: electric_panel_load_electric_clothes_dryer_new_load
argument.display_name: Electric Panel: Electric Clothes Dryer New Load
argument.description: Whether the clothes dryer is a new panel load addition to an existing service panel. Only applies to electric clothes dryer.

argument.name: electric_panel_load_dishwasher_new_load
argument.description: Whether the dishwasher is a new panel load addition to an existing service panel.

argument.name: electric_panel_load_electric_cooking_range_new_load
argument.display_name: Electric Panel: Electric Cooking Range/Oven New Load
argument.description: Whether the cooking range is a new panel load addition to an existing service panel. Only applies to electric cooking range/oven.

argument.name: electric_panel_load_misc_plug_loads_well_pump_new_load
argument.display_name: Electric Panel: Misc Plug Loads Well Pump New Load
argument.description: Whether the well pump is a new panel load addition to an existing service panel.

argument.name: electric_panel_load_misc_plug_loads_vehicle_new_load
argument.display_name: Electric Panel: Misc Plug Loads Vehicle New Load
argument.description: Whether the electric vehicle is a new panel load addition to an existing service panel.

argument.name: electric_panel_load_pool_pump_new_load
argument.display_name: Electric Panel: Pool Pump New Load
argument.description: Whether the pool pump is a new panel load addition to an existing service panel.

argument.name: electric_panel_load_electric_pool_heater_new_load
argument.display_name: Electric Panel: Electric Pool Heater New Load
argument.description: Whether the pool heater is a new panel load addition to an existing service panel. Only applies to electric pool heater.

argument.name: electric_panel_load_permanent_spa_pump_new_load
argument.display_name: Electric Panel: Permanent Spa Pump New Load
argument.description: Whether the spa pump is a new panel load addition to an existing service panel.

argument.name: electric_panel_load_electric_permanent_spa_heater_new_load
argument.display_name: Electric Panel: Electric Permanent Spa Heater New Load
argument.description: Whether the spa heater is a new panel load addition to an existing service panel. Only applies to electric permanent spa heater.

argument.name: electric_panel_load_other_power_rating
argument.description: Specifies the panel load other power rating. This represents the total of all other electric loads that are fastened in place, permanently connected, or located on a specific circuit. For example, garbage disposal, built-in microwave.

argument.name: emissions_scenario_names
argument.description: Names of emissions scenarios. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list. If not provided, no emissions scenarios are calculated.

argument.name: emissions_types
argument.description: Types of emissions (e.g., CO2e, NOx, etc.). If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: emissions_electricity_units
argument.description: Electricity emissions factors units. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list. Only lb/MWh and kg/MWh are allowed.

argument.name: emissions_electricity_filepaths
argument.description: Electricity emissions factors values, specified as an absolute/relative path to a file with hourly factors. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: emissions_fossil_fuel_units
argument.description: Fossil fuel emissions factors units. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list. Only lb/MBtu and kg/MBtu are allowed.

argument.name: emissions_natural_gas_values
argument.description: Natural gas emissions factors values, specified as an annual factor. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: emissions_propane_values
argument.description: Propane emissions factors values, specified as an annual factor. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: emissions_fuel_oil_values
argument.description: Fuel oil emissions factors values, specified as an annual factor. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: emissions_wood_values
argument.description: Wood emissions factors values, specified as an annual factor. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: utility_bill_scenario_names
argument.description: Names of utility bill scenarios. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list. If not provided, no utility bills scenarios are calculated.

argument.name: utility_bill_electricity_filepaths
argument.description: Electricity tariff file specified as an absolute/relative path to a file with utility rate structure information. Tariff file must be formatted to OpenEI API version 7. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: utility_bill_electricity_fixed_charges
argument.description: Electricity utility bill monthly fixed charges. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: utility_bill_natural_gas_fixed_charges
argument.display_name: Utility Bills: Natural Gas Fixed Charges
argument.description: Natural gas utility bill monthly fixed charges. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: utility_bill_propane_fixed_charges
argument.description: Propane utility bill monthly fixed charges. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: utility_bill_fuel_oil_fixed_charges
argument.display_name: Utility Bills: Fuel Oil Fixed Charges
argument.description: Fuel oil utility bill monthly fixed charges. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: utility_bill_wood_fixed_charges
argument.description: Wood utility bill monthly fixed charges. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: utility_bill_electricity_marginal_rates
argument.description: Electricity utility bill marginal rates. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: utility_bill_natural_gas_marginal_rates
argument.display_name: Utility Bills: Natural Gas Marginal Rates
argument.description: Natural gas utility bill marginal rates. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: utility_bill_propane_marginal_rates
argument.description: Propane utility bill marginal rates. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: utility_bill_fuel_oil_marginal_rates
argument.display_name: Utility Bills: Fuel Oil Marginal Rates
argument.description: Fuel oil utility bill marginal rates. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: utility_bill_wood_marginal_rates
argument.description: Wood utility bill marginal rates. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: utility_bill_pv_compensation_types
argument.description: Utility bill PV compensation types. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: utility_bill_pv_net_metering_annual_excess_sellback_rate_types
argument.display_name: Utility Bills: PV Net Metering Annual Excess Sellback Rate Types
argument.description: Utility bill PV net metering annual excess sellback rate types. Only applies if the PV compensation type is 'NetMetering'. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: utility_bill_pv_net_metering_annual_excess_sellback_rates
argument.display_name: Utility Bills: PV Net Metering Annual Excess Sellback Rates
argument.description: Utility bill PV net metering annual excess sellback rates. Only applies if the PV compensation type is 'NetMetering' and the PV annual excess sellback rate type is 'User-Specified'. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: utility_bill_pv_feed_in_tariff_rates
argument.display_name: Utility Bills: PV Feed-In Tariff Rates
argument.description: Utility bill PV annual full/gross feed-in tariff rates. Only applies if the PV compensation type is 'FeedInTariff'. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: utility_bill_pv_monthly_grid_connection_fee_units
argument.display_name: Utility Bills: PV Monthly Grid Connection Fee Units
argument.description: Utility bill PV monthly grid connection fee units. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: utility_bill_pv_monthly_grid_connection_fees
argument.display_name: Utility Bills: PV Monthly Grid Connection Fees
argument.description: Utility bill PV monthly grid connection fees. If multiple scenarios, use a comma-separated list.
